# Joseph Musembi — Full Stack Developer & Software Engineer

> Portfolio and professional background of Joseph Musembi, specializing in scalable web applications, modern JavaScript frameworks, and cloud technologies.

## Contact & Links
- Live Website: https://Joseph-the-Engineer.github.io/joseph-musembi-portfolio/
- GitHub Profile: https://github.com/Joseph-the-Engineer

## Core Expertise
- **Experience:** 5+ years in full-stack web development.
- **Frontend:** React, JavaScript (ES6+), Tailwind CSS, Responsive Web Design.
- **Backend & Cloud:** Scalable server architecture, robust API design, and cloud deployments.

## Key Projects
Detailed engineering blueprints, implementations, and source code are available natively within this repository structure under `/src/components` and `/src/pages`.
